content: Hi, I'm Prabhchintan Randhawa. I was born and raised in Punjab, India and currently live in Austin, Texas. I run a one-person, bootstrapped digital asset custodian startup running Ethereum validators and selling product management services. I call it retroflex.eth. Previously I've worked at companies like Shell and Apple for roughly a decade. I like to make music in my free time. Following is my Twitter feed: Tweets by prabhchintan
contentRendered:
Hi, I'm Prabhchintan Randhawa. I was born and raised in Punjab, India and currently live in Austin, Texas. I run a one-person, bootstrapped digital asset custodian startup running Ethereum validators and selling product management services. I call it retroflex.eth.
